span.p: no - not graded or not locked

span.p: Is the problem in the video master or the audio master?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the picture locked and color graded?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Technical re-format - reprocess from the graded master to spec - no creative rework

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Creative and technical problem - assess days required - escalate to EP immediately

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Technical re-spec - re-export stems and master to spec from the approved session

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Mix problem - schedule a final mix session - assess impact on delivery date

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Clearance problem - contact music supervisor immediately - assess whether an alternative cue can be cut in or the license can be rushed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Format or content error - fix and re-submit - lowest severity - typically same-day resolution
